{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323045902922AEC31285B7C417412"}"},"total":1115},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7487770495040389913","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看奥，这种文就是不能拉太长篇幅，太慢就看不下去，太快品不出来什么，好的作品给人一种看完了意犹未尽，但结局不留遗憾，挖坑给填，节奏，篇幅都很好，推荐大家去看👀"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743386001,"group_id":"7360596808038353944","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Spocie0NLFXa8rWSxUDgdvszEFT6fWcWlpaeYE3k6h","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ff91525e3d434e3c92e9c82f6e033989~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787554&x-signature=bG%2Bl6si98gq5aXUvn9Mm1rRkwdU%3D","user_id":"4015854226255495","user_name":"小火龙(＾▽＾)"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4015854226255495","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7360596808038353944","book_info":{"abstract":"云海间自由穿梭的天耀云鲸，自由奔跑在草原的极影灵豹，隐藏在山林间的幽影巨蟒，平静深渊的海底下酣睡的墨渊蛟龙。
碧厄苍蝶、映日王莲、九头龙柏、……
一切的一切都构成了一个丰富多彩的御兽世界。
洛辰穿越而来，并且绑定了一个店铺，只要培育出御兽并且能够售卖出去，自己就会获得店铺的奖励，而且能够发现每一只御兽身上不同的进化路线。
常规的进化路线：金刚狼→金翼狼→金甲战狼。
洛辰看到的进化路线：金刚狼→破刃银狼→霜刃狼王
金刚狼→锁链冥狼→血灵狂狼。
洛辰在向神级店铺的道路上一去不复返。
